demographics.reasoning: US academic institution, UCF BIP international founder audience. Primary corridor is Latin America (Colombia, Brazil, Argentina, Mexico). Diverse professional representation required.

imageStyle.name: Cinematic Digital Painting
imageStyle.description: Rich atmospheric digital paintings with dramatic golden hour lighting, painterly brushstrokes visible, warm saturated colors. Concept art quality. Not photorealistic, not cartoonish — cinematic and aspirational.
characteristics: Deep blue sky transitioning to rich orange and gold at horizon
Atmospheric haze and warm saturated colors
Concept art quality, rich and atmospheric
Palm trees and Central Florida vegetation

contentContext.topic: U.S. Market Readiness for International Founders
contentContext.targetAudience: International entrepreneurs entering the U.S. market through UCF Business Incubation Program, primarily Latin American founders
contentContext.setting: Central Florida business environments — downtown offices, banks, coworking spaces, UCF campus, commercial corridors, suburban neighborhoods, tech hubs

avatarConfig.character: Confident Latina woman, early 30s, dark shoulder-length wavy hair
avatarConfig.style: Cinematic digital painting, matching course visual identity
avatarConfig.framing: Chest up, positioned on left third of frame with open space on right for text overlays
avatarConfig.eyeContact: Direct, warm, engaging — critical for InfinityTalk lip-sync
avatarConfig.facialRequirements: Clean facial features with clear jawline and lips
avatarConfig.antiPhotorealism: NOT a photograph NOT photorealistic, digital painting with visible paint texture

outfitVariations.module-8: Elegant navy blazer over white top with subtle gold pin

copyrightRules: No recognizable brand logos, mascots, or iconography
Theme parks must be generic — no castles, no specific park elements
No university logos or mascots on campus scenes
No NASA/SpaceX branding — generic launch facility
No text rendered in images — all text via HTML overlays
